content:
# Chlorophyll A

**Summary**: A pigment produced by algae and cyanobacteria used as an indicator of biomass.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2015-yusuf|Yusuf, 2015]] measured chlorophyll-a to assess the impact on primary productivity.

## Scientific Context

- [[2015-yusuf|Yusuf, 2015]] Indicator of algal bloom potential due to nutrient enrichment.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2015-yusuf|Yusuf, 2015]] Fluorescence detection using a bench fluorometer.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The highest concentration was recorded at Dammam outfall (35.04 µg/L). ([[2015-yusuf|Yusuf, 2015, p. 39]])
